recastApplied.summary: Body/M/epi-tauri DEPRECATED; /body now lives as the 0/1 daily-layout mode inside the single Theia shell at Idea/Pratibimba/System. 0/1 surface = omnipanel-shell + pratibimba-layouts; bridge lite-mode = KERNEL_BRIDGE_API.subscribe path from kernel-bridge.

verticalSliceSteps.description: Open Theia shell in 0/1 daily layout
verticalSliceSteps.evidence: PRATIBIMBA_LAYOUT_DAILY_0_1 = 'daily-0-1'; DAILY_0_1_DESCRIPTOR.expectedWidgets includes pratibimba.omnipanel.shell + pratibimba.daily.status-display + pratibimba.daily.agent-checkin (5 widgets total).

verticalSliceSteps.description: Observe live profile generation + readiness via kernel-bridge
verticalSliceSteps.evidence: Substrate bridge published a public_current_with_graph_provenance profile at generation=7, mode=lite. No forbidden field key (any of the 18) present in cachedProfile.

verticalSliceSteps.description: Receive S5 review notification driven by S5 candidate
verticalSliceSteps.evidence: synthReviewAlertSnapshot([1 human-required cand-vs-1]) → pendingCount=1, latest.humanRequired=true, allowedDecisions=['defer'] (UI-gate parity for human-required candidates).

buildOpenControlRoomIntent → requestedLayout=ide-deep, requestedExtensionId=agentic-control-room, requestedContributionId=run-flow. buildOpenReviewItemIntent → requestedLayout=ide-deep, requestedExtensionId=m5-epii, requestedContributionId=review.

verticalSliceSteps.description: Switch to deep IDE layout, preserve sessionKey/DAY/NOW/profileGeneration/coordinate
verticalSliceSteps.evidence: PratibimbaLayoutSwitcher.switchTo(ide-deep, preserved) fires onLayoutChange with preservedState containing all 4 preserved keys. Every field in BODY_DEEP_LINK_CONTEXT_FIELDS (8 fields) survives the cross-layout intent projection except improvementId (rides session state per Track 05 T5).

After initial activate() and 5 layout transitions (daily→deep→daily→deep→daily→deep), upstreamSubscriptionCount remained === 1. Activate guard `if (eventUnsubscribe !== null) return` lifted verbatim from body-lite-runtime-service.ts.
After daily→deep→daily round-trip with activate() called at each stop, switcher.currentLayout=daily-0-1 and bridge.snapshot.upstreamSubscriptionCount=1.

verticalSliceSteps.description: Privacy scan — 0/1 daily layout shows protected handles/summaries only
verticalSliceSteps.evidence: Three sub-steps (8a/8b/8c): (a) all 4 lite surfaces (reviewAlertBadge, agentCheckIn, safeSourceHandleRow, deepLinkIntent) drop every forbidden-privacy row; (b) deep recursive scan of rendered DOM payload + Theia workspace persistence state finds ZERO occurrences of any of the 18 forbidden keys; (c) LITE_SURFACE_FORBIDDEN_PRIVACY_CLASSES enumerates the 8 required forbidden classes matching Thread C's ide-shell forbidden set.

deviationsFromIdealCapturePath: Did not drive a live headless-chrome puppeteer session because (a) the Theia browser-server at http://127.0.0.1:3000 is not running in this lab session and (b) launching it under `pnpm --dir Idea/Pratibimba/System start` would compete for resources with the in-flight 10.T1 (profile ledger) and 10.T2 (S2+S5 baseline) thread runs.

Honest port-3000 disambiguation: macOS reports port 3000 as 'hbci' and SpaceTimeDB happens to bind it — TCP probe alone is misleading. Test now does an HTTP GET and checks for <html> response before classifying as live-theia.

Gateway at ws://127.0.0.1:18794 unreachable, so the S5 review notification step uses the production synthReviewAlertSnapshot synthesiser against a representative S5CandidateLiteRow rather than a live gateway capability response. The synthesiser is the same code path the live wire-up executes after the capability returns.

Substrate vertical-slice driver re-implements (in a few lines) the activate guard from body-lite-runtime-service.ts and the switchTo flow from layout-switcher.ts so the upstream-once invariant is exercised against production-shape state without booting Theia DI in node:test. The verbatim guard text and the production class are both cited in the test prose.

The deep browser-driven path is the responsibility of the Track 05 T9 acceptance harness (extensions/acceptance-harness/scripts/acceptance.mjs), which already uses the [ACCEPTANCE:<step-id>:<key>=<value>] sentinel pattern this test emits. This test's sentinels are collected by that harness when it is later driven against a running shell.
screenshotsReason: No live Theia shell to drive headless Chrome against. The test plugs into the acceptance-harness sentinel collector so a later live drive will surface the same 8-step checkpoints with browser evidence.
